notes:
# Keen 0.14.0 — Phase 4 priority-score restructure milestone

Joint release across `keen-frontend`, `keen-backend`, and `keen-releases` 0.14.0. Phase 4 of the priority-score restructure lands: `Task.priority` is now a **derived** field (computed from `importance` × `effort` ÷ `dueDate`), with the `URGENT|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW` vocabulary fully retired in favor of `NOW|NEXT|SOON|LATER`. Summary Sections gain first-class `importance` / `effort` filtering and three new presets that exploit them. Joint with this release: the managed backend rolls forward to v0.14.0, starting the watch-interval clock for the eventual `tasks.priority` column drop at Gate 3.

## Highlights

### What's new

- **Three new Summary Section presets.** `High importance` (`importance ∈ {HIGH, CRITICAL}`) for the user-declared input regardless of bucket; `Quick wins` (`effort ∈ {XS, S}`) for small tasks that read as urgent because of their _size_, not their consequence; `Strategic` (`importance ∈ {HIGH, CRITICAL} AND effort ∈ {L, XL}`) for the consequential work that doesn't fit a single sitting and needs deliberate scheduling.
- **`importance` and `effort` are first-class Summary Section filter fields.** Pickable from FilterGroupEditor next to `priority`, with the `eq` / `ne` / `in` operator set and the canonical enum token vocabulary.
- **`Now` / `Next` / `Soon` / `Later` everywhere.** The `URGENT|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW` vocabulary is fully retired from the UI; CSS palette tokens renamed accordingly. Customized priority-color settings survive the rename byte-identical via a lazy migrator (`SETTINGS_VERSION` v2 → v3).

### Reliability

- **Importance and Effort cycling icons now update on `MilestoneDetailPage` and `ProjectDashboardPage`.** A GraphQL fragment shape mismatch had the `EntitiesSection` task rows reading `importance` / `effort` as `undefined`, so every cycle-click submitted the same fallback delta and the post-`TaskUpdated` refetch re-hydrated `undefined`, making the icons look dead. `LinkedTaskFields` brought to shape parity with `TASK_FRAGMENT`; 10 new lock-in tests prevent regression.
- **Tutorial tasks regain their curated SOON / NEXT / LATER ordering on existing installs.** A one-shot Tauri migration (051) corrects three tutorial rows that had silently collapsed into "all SOON" since the Path A → Path B vocabulary rename. Fresh installs unaffected.
- **Apple Reminders sync prefers `task.priorityDerived ?? task.priority`** across three call sites. Forward-compatible with the eventual `tasks.priority` column drop — without the fallback, reminders would silently lose their `!` flag on Gate 3 day-one.

### Architecture

- **`sortByPriorityScore` replaces `sortByPriority`.** Intra-bucket sort is now a numeric `priorityScore` `DESC` comparator over the precomputed `Float`, instead of an enum-string lookup. The server is the single source of truth for the formula; no JS-side duplication, no drift risk.
- **Path B → derived bucket SQL pushdown.** Backend `priority` / `priorityIn` filters now match against the derived bucket (via a new `buildPriorityDerivedBucketSqlExpression()` helper), not the stored column. No GraphQL surface change — only the SQL semantics shifted. Built-in `Now` and `Next` summary sections now match the derived bucket end-to-end.

### Managed hosting

- **The Image Verification panel will show v0.14.0 as Verified** once your managed machine rolls forward (which happened atomically with this release). The signed manifest contains digests for both `0.14.0` (image-index) and `0.14.0-linux-amd64` (sub-digest); cosign signature + SLSA attestation are stored as OCI 1.1 referrers in GHCR.

---

Full per-PR history: see [`keen-frontend/CHANGELOG.md`](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-frontend/blob/v0.14.0/CHANGELOG.md#0140---2026-05-11) and [`keen-backend/CHANGELOG.md`](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-backend/blob/v0.14.0/CHANGELOG.md#0140---2026-05-11).
